qcatchphrase: Can u decrypt the message?
qdesc:
We intercepted an important audio transmission that contains a secret message!

The file Important Message.wav seems to contain some kind of coded communication. Can you decode it and recover the message?

Once you've decoded the transmission
question: wrap the message in the flag format: ritCTF{message_here}\n\nNote: Make sure to replace any spaces with underscores and format the decoded text so it makes sense!
clue2: Listen carefully to the audio file. Do you hear a pattern of short and long beeps? This is a classic encoding method used in telecommunications!
clue3: The audio contains Morse code! There are plenty of online tools and websites that can help you decode morse code from audio files. Try searching for ""morse code audio decoder"" or ""morse code from audio online"".
